We were surrounded by those beautiful green trees, making it such a scenic spot for our climbing adventure. It’s great to see her so focused and happy, managing all the gear at the base of the climb.

photos.caption: Arabesque sport route 1st relay, ValDavid
photos.captionKii: This photo captures one of my friends on a rocky ledge, surrounded by lush green trees, during our outdoor climbing adventure. She's looking down, carefully assessing her next move or perhaps setting up for a rappel, with her hand resting on the sturdy tree trunk for balance. She's fully geared up with her harness, carabiners, and other equipment visible, and a coil of blue rope sits at her feet, while a red rope is securely tied around the tree. It was a day full of intricate rope work and navigating beautiful natural terrain.

photos.caption: How does it work?.... ropework on Arabesque 1st relay, ValDavid

We were surrounded by so much lush greenery, with all those beautiful trees in the background, which really added to the natural, adventurous feel of the day. It's a great shot showing the intricate and crucial work that goes into safe climbing.

photos.caption: Raz attacking the new sport route (3 pitch) on the right of Arabesque, ValDavid

It was such an invigorating day out in nature, and moments like this truly capture the challenge and reward of rock climbing.

It really captures the exhilarating feeling of being high up, surrounded by nature, and the satisfaction of a challenging descent.

They're wearing their signature red helmet and bright yellow jacket, making their way up this deep gully or crack in the rock face. I can see the blue climbing rope taut, indicating their progress, and the surrounding trees cast long shadows, adding to the rugged feel of the environment. It's a great reminder of the focus and determination needed for each move on the climb!

photos.caption: Redondance
photos.captionKii: This close-up shot perfectly captures some of the essential safety equipment we rely on during our climbs. You can see the vibrant red climbing rope, with its distinct blue and yellow flecks, securely threaded through a metal carabiner that's anchored directly into the solid rock. Another carabiner is positioned further down the rope, emphasizing the intricate setup that keeps us safe. The rugged texture of the rock face is so visible here, reminding me of the natural elements we're always engaging with. It's a testament to the trust we place in our gear and our systems when out on the rock.

photos.caption: The 3rd pitch
photos.captionKii: This shot gives a detailed look at some of the setup for our climb. You can spot my climbing partner in the background, wearing their distinctive red helmet and a bright yellow jacket, appearing to be observing or resting on a section of the rock. Nearby, blue climbing ropes are coiled, and in the foreground, you can clearly see our ropes secured with carabiners, stretching across a gap in the rock – a crucial part of our safety system. The little pine tree growing bravely out of the rock adds a touch of natural resilience, and the dappled sunlight through the surrounding forest canopy creates

photos.caption: View from the 3rd pitch at LeFou
photos.captionKii: This view from the rock face really captures the beauty of being out here! I love how close the vibrant green pine needles are, almost brushing against the rugged texture of the gray rock on the right as I look out. In the distance, you can see the endless expanse of lush green forests and rolling hills under a bright, partly cloudy sky. It's such a peaceful moment, taking in the scenery from this elevated perspective, a nice contrast to the focus needed for climbing.

photos.caption: Agu at 2nd Relay
photos.captionKii: This shot gives a great overhead view of my climbing partner carefully organizing the ropes and other gear on the rock face. The rugged texture of the rock and the surrounding green pine trees really set the scene for our adventure. I remember looking down from my position and appreciating their focused concentration as they prepared for the next part of our climb.

photos.caption: Agu at 2nd Relay

We're on this awesome rocky outcrop, with the lush green pine trees and dense forest stretching out below us. It was such a bright, sunny day, making the whole experience even more enjoyable. I love how t

photos.caption: Agu at 1st Relay

photos.caption: Making fun of Graciela
photos.captionKii: This shot brings back memories of a really enjoyable meal out! Here I am, about to dive into some delicious sushi at a restaurant. I remember focusing intently on picking up one of the rolls with my chopsticks, and there's such a great variety on the plate – some green-wrapped ones and yellow ones, all looking so fresh and tempting. You can also spot a small dish of soy sauce and a white sake bottle in the background, adding to the authentic Japanese dining experience. The dim lighting created a lovely, intimate ambiance for the evening.

photos.caption: J&J... 10 ans deja
photos.captionKii: This photo truly warms my heart, capturing such a sweet and tender moment! It looks like my dad is giving my mom a big, loving hug from behind, and her smile is just radiant. You can see how happy and content she is, with that joyful expression on her face. He's holding her close, and you can really feel the affection between them. They're enjoying this quiet moment outdoors, with a soft, overcast sky above and some green trees in the background, creating a peaceful and intimate scene.

photos.caption: Jacques et Kamou pointing
photos.captionKii: It was such a lovely, sunny day, perfect for spending time outdoors. I managed to capture this great shot of a man smiling warmly at the camera, looking quite relaxed in the lush green garden. In the background, our beautiful white dog is enjoying the grass, with its tail curled up and looking alert. The garden is full of green hedges and some colorful flowers, making for a really peaceful scene. It felt good to just soak up the sun and enjoy these quiet moments.

photos.caption: Barbara still climbing after everyone is done for the day!
photos.captionKii: This shot really highlights another moment from our climbing day, showing one of our friends making great progress up the rock face! She's got her blue helmet on, reaching skillfully for a handhold, while her climbing shoes are securely placed on the textured rock. Below, another friend is fully focused on belaying, holding the rope taut and looking up intently to support her ascent. In the background, you can see more of our group observing from the rocky ground, enjoying the outdoors. It was such a collaborative and exciting day for everyone involved!

photos.caption: Barbara, kind enough to climb to remove my anchor
photos.captionKii: This shot really captures the teamwork involved in rock climbing! Here, one of our friends is making their way up the textured rock face, skillfully finding handholds and footholds. I love their blue helmet, it really stands out against the rock. Below, another friend is focused on belaying, keeping the rope secure and providing support. You can see the coils of rope on the ground and the rocky terrain we were navigating, all surrounded by lush green trees. It was such a great day out, and this image perfectly shows the dynamic of climbing and belaying.

photos.caption: cuddle break
photos.captionKii: Here's my friend taking a well-deserved break by the river, relaxing on a blue mat with his two adorable dogs! He's sitting on the rocky ground, wearing a white t-shirt and khaki shorts, with a big smile for the camera. His black Doberman-like dog is lying comfortably on the mat next to him, and another fluffy, light-colored dog is nestled close behind him. The rocky cliffs and wet ground suggest we're still deep in our outdoor adventure, and it's nice to see everyone, including our furry companions, enjoying the day.

photos.caption: A crowd
photos.captionKii: This wider shot really shows the whole scene of our climbing day! You can see one of our friends making great progress up the rock face, expertly finding holds and using her body position. Down on the rocky bank, the rest of us are gathered, some waiting for our turn or offering encouragement, with coils of rope and extra helmets on the ground. The lush trees atop the cliffs and the clear water to the right really emphasize the beautiful natural setting where we were having our climbing adventure. It was such a great group outing!

photos.caption: Looks easy from here

Dressed in his bright red shirt, dark shorts, and white helmet, his harness is packed with all the essential gear—ropes, carabiners, and even that handy Arc'teryx pouch. The blue rope trailing below confirms his secure belay, highlighting the focus and skill required to conquer these challenging outdoor climbs.

photos.caption: ouf... can't hold this any longer

It's awesome to see him in action, fully immersed in the challenge of the climb, with the blue rope securely trailing below him.

The sheer, layered rock wall behind him and the ropes leading up really highlight the intensity and skill involved in navigating these challenging climbs.

photos.caption: Quebec city — Me encanta esta foto!

We're standing on what looks like a paved city street or plaza, and you can really feel the happy energy between us. It's moments like these, simply enjoying each other's company while exploring, that make for the best memories.

photos.caption: Quebec city — Los intocables?
photos.captionKii: My friend and I struck a fun pose, standing back-to-back with our arms crossed and smiling, as we explored a charming city street. The cobblestone path stretched out before us, flanked by beautiful old brick buildings with intricate windows and details. I love how the vibrant pink flowers in the planters added a pop of color to the scene, and you can see a few shops and cafes with outdoor seating further down the street, hinting at the lively atmosphere. It was such a great day just wandering around and taking in the sights.

photos.caption: En casa — Kamouk, perro traidor!
photos.captionKii: I'm stretched out on the warm, polished wooden floor, enjoying a super relaxed moment as I cuddle with this sweet spotted white and brown dog. My furry friend is lying right on top of me, and we both look so content. The bookshelves in the background, filled with books, and the potted plant give the room a really cozy, lived-in feel. It's these quiet, comfortable moments at home with my dog that I truly love.

photos.caption: En casa — Todos juntitos, como una familia!
photos.captionKii: We all squeezed together for a fun group photo inside, with my friends and me happily hugging the spotted white and brown dog. It's such a sweet moment, and you can see how much we all adore our furry friend. The warm yellow walls, the wooden floor, and the cheerful balloons in the background, along with the dining table, really capture the cozy and inviting feel of our gathering at home. These are the moments I cherish with loved ones, both human and canine!

photos.caption: Casa de Stef y Agu — Toda la familia  :o)
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweet moment indoors, where I'm crouched down, happily petting a spotted white and brown dog that's relaxing on the polished wooden floor. My friend is standing next to me, smiling warmly, with a white bag slung over her shoulder. The room feels cozy and inviting, with a couple of framed pictures on the yellow wall and some festive balloons—red and blue on one side, and purple and blue on the other—adding a cheerful touch. It was a lovely, casual gathering at home.

photos.caption: pan-waptaicefield.jpg — Center-east part of the Wapta icefield... Soooo big... what about going to the AB/BC Border crest on the right, it's just about 2km from here?
photos.captionKii: I captured this incredibly clear panoramic shot of a vast, textured glacier stretching out under a brilliant, cloudless blue sky. The foreground is dominated by the intricate patterns of the snow and ice, showing every undulation and crevice. Around us, majestic snow-capped peaks with dramatic, jagged dark rock formations rise sharply, creating an awe-inspiring vista. It's truly breathtaking to be surrounded by such immense, raw natural beauty under such perfect conditions.

photos.caption: pan-topresidentpass.jpg — Last few vertical steps before President's pass... we're following 2 guys from Calgary... can they go faster?
photos.captionKii: I put together this panoramic shot looking up a vast, snow-covered slope where two figures, small in the distance, are steadily making their way upwards. It feels like we're deep within a massive glacier or a very extensive snowfield, with intricate textures visible in the ice and snow. Dark, rugged rock formations rise steeply on either side, framing our ascent, and the sky above is a beautiful, moody grey with heavy clouds. It really captures the scale of our climb and the relentless, awe-inspiring beauty of these mountains.

photos.caption: pan-frompresidenttop.jpg — Vice President and Emerald Glacier... North to the right (facing east)
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping panoramic view from a high vantage point, looking out over an incredibly vast expanse of snow-covered mountains. In the mid-ground, a prominent peak is blanketed in textured snow and ice, showing the intricate formations of a glacier or massive snowfield, with rugged, dark rock faces emerging from beneath. The rocky, barren slope we're on leads down towards this incredible scene, while in the far distance, countless layers of majestic, jagged peaks stretch out under a hazy, cloudy sky. It's truly breathtaking to be surrounded by such immense, raw natural beauty.

photos.caption: pan-frompresidentpass.jpg — Agu happy to finally arrive to President's pass (The glacier is behind us!!!)... it's 9h30AM, we left the hut around 5AM
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping panoramic view from a high, snowy ridge, showing a companion standing firmly on the textured snow. They're geared up in a bright red jacket, dark pants, and a red hat, with what looks like spikes on their boots for grip, and a rope clearly visible, suggesting we're traversing some serious alpine terrain. The vast expanse of snow-covered slopes and rugged, dark peaks stretch out around us, with a breathtaking mountain range fading into the distant horizon under a cloudy sky that hints at a setting sun. The raw, imposing beauty of these high-altitude mountains and glaciers is just breathtaking, and moments like these make all the effort worthwhile.

It's moments like these, witnessing such vast and unspoiled beauty, that make this whole exploration so worthwhile.

photos.caption: Carrots anyone
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful day for an outdoor adventure! Here we are, enjoying a horseback riding excursion through a lovely autumn forest. I love seeing the mix of bare trees and those still holding onto their golden and brown leaves, creating such a picturesque setting. It looks like a clear, sunny day, perfect for hitting the trails. It's wonderful to be out with friends, taking in the quiet beauty of nature from horseback. I remember the fresh air and the gentle sway of the horses as we made our way through the woods.

photos.caption: Horseback riding happy
photos.captionKii: What a lovely moment from our horseback riding trip! Here's my friend, beaming at the camera, dressed warmly in her red jacket and turtleneck as she rides her horse. Behind her, another friend is also enjoying the ride through the beautiful autumn woods. The trees are just magnificent with their golden and orange leaves, and the sunlight really makes them glow. You can see the ground is covered in fallen leaves, adding to that perfect fall atmosphere. It was such a bright and enjoyable day out on the trails with everyone.

photos.caption: Having boring horse ride
photos.captionKii: Here's another beautiful shot from our horseback riding adventure! This time, it's a lovely woman on her horse, looking so calm and peaceful as she takes in the autumn scenery. She's wearing a practical red jacket, light top, and jeans, perfectly dressed for a trail ride. The horse is a beautiful brown with white markings on its legs and forehead. We were riding through this open, grassy area bordered by trees that had mostly shed their leaves, giving off that classic late fall vibe. It was a clear, sunny day, just perfect for being out in nature and enjoying the quiet rhythm of the horses.

photos.caption: Mt Whiteface Road side — Ice climbing anyone?
photos.captionKii: What an absolutely stunning winter landscape! Here's someone making their way through the pristine snow, bundled up in a bright red jacket, black pants, and hat, holding ski poles. The background is just breathtaking, with massive rock formations completely covered in thick snow and sharp icicles hanging down. Above the rocks, the trees are also heavily laden with snow, creating a truly magical scene. It was a clear, sunny day, perfect for enjoying the quiet beauty of these snow-covered trails and the majestic winter scenery around us.

photos.caption: s0014
photos.captionKii: What an absolutely breathtaking view during our winter outing! Here's a friend making their way along a pristine snowy path, surrounded by magnificent snow-laden trees that look like they're straight out of a fairy tale. The sun is shining brightly, casting a beautiful glare and highlighting the crisp blue sky and fluffy white clouds. In the distance, a mountain shrouded in mist adds to the dramatic landscape. It's just incredible to be out in such quiet, majestic nature, making memories on these beautiful trails.

photos.caption: s0012
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful day for some winter fun! Here's a person enjoying a serene cross-country ski on a wide, snowy trail, surrounded by magnificent snow-covered trees. They are wearing a bright red jacket, black pants, a black hat, and a backpack, perfectly geared up for the cold. The trail is pristine with fresh ski tracks, winding through a dense forest blanketed in white. The blue sky above, dotted with fluffy white clouds, makes for a truly picturesque winter wonderland. It’s moments like these, immersed in nature’s quiet beauty, that truly rejuvenate the spirit.

photos.caption: s0002
photos.captionKii: Here's my friend, looking happy and relaxed at our cozy home gathering! He's smiling directly at the camera, holding a glass, and wearing a light-colored long-sleeved shirt. Behind him, you can see a lovely wooden bookshelf, neatly filled with books like 'Petit Larousse' and 'Robert', along with some framed photos that add to the personal touch of the space. There's also a small vase with dried flowers, making the scene feel even more inviting. I love capturing these candid moments where everyone is just enjoying themselves in a comfortable setting.

photos.caption: s0001
photos.captionKii: What a warm and happy memory! Here are three wonderful people, possibly my friends or family, gathered together and beaming with smiles in what looks like a cozy kitchen. The man on the left, with glasses and an orange shirt, is smiling broadly, hand in his pocket. The woman in the center, with long brown hair and a floral top, is leaning into the group, looking absolutely joyful. And on the right, an older woman in a cheerful yellow sweater is embracing the central woman, with a radiant smile on her face. The kitchen shelves filled with jars, mugs, and other items in the background suggest a

photos.caption: 10km_race0001
photos.captionKii: What a great feeling celebrating with friends after the Oasis Festival du Marathon International de Montréal! Here are two of my friends, beaming with huge smiles and embracing each other. The man on the left is wearing a light green t-shirt, and the woman on the right has on a white t-shirt with a red headband. Both are sporting their race bibs, prominently featuring the 'OASIS' logo, and the woman has a medal or lanyard around her neck, holding a water bottle. Behind them, there's a vibrant display of red and white 'OASIS' balloons, and you can see rows of blue stadium seats, indicating we'r

photos.caption: stalban0001
photos.captionKii: What a sweet moment! Here's my friend, all smiles in her red climbing helmet, taking a break by the river. She's sitting on the rocky bank, giving a big hug to our loyal English Setter, who looks so happy to be getting some affection. You can see the river flowing past in the background, with those impressive layered rock formations on the opposite bank. It’s moments like these, pausing to enjoy the companionship and the beautiful natural setting, that truly make these outdoor adventures special. Looks like she's got some gear, maybe a blue mat, beside her too.

photos.caption: stalban0002
photos.captionKii: What a perfect day for some outdoor adventure! Here's a friend of mine, looking ready for action in her orange tank top and light pants, with her climbing harness and gear clearly visible on her waist. Beside her, my loyal English Setter is patiently waiting, on leash, looking quite comfortable amidst the rocky terrain and sparse greenery. It looks like we're at the base of some cliffs, a great spot for both trekking and maybe some climbing. It's always great to have company, especially my dog, on these rugged outings!

photos.caption: stalban0003
photos.captionKii: What a great shot of my friend here! He's looking so happy and relaxed, giving a shaka sign with a wide smile. He's holding onto a climbing rope, which reminds me of all the adventures we've been having on this trip. I love his wooden beaded necklace and sunglasses hanging around his neck – definitely in his element outdoors. The background with those rugged rock formations really sets the scene for our mountain activities. It's awesome to capture these moments with everyone enjoying the journey!

photos.caption: stalban0004
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic spot for a break during our adventure! Here, two of my friends are relaxing by the river on these wide, rocky banks. The man on the left, shirtless and wearing a hat, is looking towards the woman, who's wearing a white tank top and dark pants, with one leg casually propped up. Their gear, including a red helmet, a dark backpack, and a blue water bottle, is scattered nearby, suggesting we've been active. The river flows past, reflecting the bright sunlight, and the background features impressive rocky cliffs topped with lush trees. It's moments like these, pausing in beautiful

photos.caption: stalban0005
photos.captionKii: What a well-deserved break by the river during our trekking adventure! Here, two of my companions are taking a moment to rest and refuel on this large, flat rock. The woman on the left, with dark hair and wearing a white tank top and dark pants, is sitting comfortably with some food, while the other person in the blue shirt and light hat is also relaxing, holding what looks like a snack. Our gear—multiple backpacks, water bottles, and other equipment—is spread out around us, ready for our next move. The sparkling river flows past, reflecting the sunlight, with its rocky banks providing a beaut

photos.caption: stalban0006
photos.captionKii: Here's another great shot from our adventure, capturing two of my friends looking ready for action by the river! The man is smiling broadly in his red climbing helmet and sunglasses, with his arm around the woman who's wearing a bucket hat, glasses, and a blue top, with her arms crossed. Both are geared up in their climbing harnesses, which really shows we were in the thick of our outdoor activities. The river, sparkling in the sun, flows past rocks in the background, making for a beautiful, rugged backdrop. It’s moments like these, seeing everyone enjoying the journey and each other's company

photos.caption: white_mountain0009
photos.captionKii: What an amazing feeling to be up here, navigating these rugged mountain trails! Here's my companion, looking strong and determined, making their way across a very rocky, lichen-covered slope. They're all geared up in a teal jacket, dark pants, and a hat, using trekking poles to steady themselves as they stand on top of a rocky outcrop. The landscape is incredibly stark and beautiful, with those resilient little evergreen plants clinging to the rocks. It's a testament to the challenge and reward of reaching these higher elevations, surrounded by nothing but the raw beauty of the mountains.

photos.caption: white_mountain0008
photos.captionKii: What a companion for our trek! Here's my beautiful English Setter, standing proudly on the rocky, grassy terrain, looking off into the misty mountainscape. She's wearing her red collar and leash, which is draped across the ground. Beside the wooden trail signpost, which clearly indicates 'CASTLE RAVINE TRAIL' among others, is my black backpack, looking ready for more adventure. The fog is really rolling in, giving everything such a dramatic, mysterious feel. It's moments like these, sharing the trail with my loyal dog amidst such stunning, raw nature, that I truly cherish.

photos.caption: white_mountain0007
photos.captionKii: What an incredible sunset or sunrise we witnessed during our mountain trek! The sky is absolutely ablaze with vibrant oranges and soft pinks, melting into deep purples and blues as the clouds roll across. The silhouette of the tall evergreen trees and other deciduous foliage in the foreground frames the spectacle perfectly, with the sun's rays peeking through the branches on the left, casting such a beautiful glow. It's moments like these, surrounded by such natural beauty at the start or end of a day, that make all the effort of trekking so worthwhile.

photos.caption: white_mountain0006
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful start or end to a day on our trek! Here's my companion, looking comfortable and happy in his blue and black jacket and a cozy patterned beanie, smiling brightly at the camera. We're at what looks like a mountain hut or shelter, with that rustic wooden structure that seems to be an outhouse to the left, and part of a larger wooden building next to it. The golden light from the rising or setting sun is absolutely beautiful, filtering through the dense trees and giving everything a warm glow. It's moments like these, finding a spot to rest amidst such natural beauty, that are tru

photos.caption: white_mountain0001
photos.captionKii: What an incredible feeling to be out here again, high up on the mountain ridges! Here's my companion making their way along a challenging, rocky path, with their big green backpack clearly visible. The trail is quite rugged, winding past these impressive rock formations and through hardy alpine scrub. Looking out, the views are just breathtaking—layers of green mountains stretch far into the hazy distance, with the sky hinting at some weather rolling in. It's moments like these, surrounded by such immense natural beauty and the quiet challenge of the trek, that really remind me why I love thes

photos.caption: white_mountain0005
photos.captionKii: What a great shot of my friend and me at what feels like the top of the world! We both look so happy and accomplished, enjoying the incredible view from up here. I'm wearing my practical beige sun hat and a red jacket, while my friend is rocking his Guinness cap and glasses, also in a red shirt under his blue and black jacket. You can see the rocky, lichen-covered terrain right beside us, and the expansive cloudy sky with those hazy mountain layers in the distance. It was definitely a memorable moment to capture after all that trekking.

photos.caption: white_mountain0004
photos.captionKii: What an amazing moment during our mountain trek! Here's my companion, looking ready for anything as he pauses on this rugged trail. He's got his black cap on, a red shirt visible under his sturdy blue and black jacket, with his hands casually on his hips. Around him, the ground is covered in these dense, green alpine shrubs and scattered rocks, all leading up to the majestic mountain peak in the background. The mist rolling in over the summit adds such a dramatic, adventurous feel to the whole scene. It's truly breathtaking to be out here, surrounded by such raw natural beauty.

photos.caption: white_mountain0003
photos.captionKii: What an incredible scene from our mountain adventure! Here, my companion is navigating a particularly rugged, lichen-covered section of the ridge, really getting into the climb with their large green and blue backpack visible, sleeping pad and all. The mist is rolling in dramatically over the dense evergreen forest below, creating such a mystical atmosphere, and in the distance, I can just make out another peak and a hint of a lake. It's moments like these, surrounded by such raw beauty and the challenge of the climb, that make these treks so unforgettable.

photos.caption: white_mountain0002
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic view from up here! My companion is absolutely beaming, pausing during our trek on this rugged mountain path. They're bundled up in a blue and black jacket, sporting a cap, and their large green backpack with that blue sleeping pad is clearly visible. The rocks around us are covered in interesting lichen, and the sparse evergreen trees give way to these incredible hazy, cloud-kissed peaks in the distance. It’s moments like these, where the challenge meets such breathtaking scenery, that make these mountain adventures so rewarding. I love capturing these smiles amidst the grand

photos.caption:
Love of dogs — Waht dogs can do... bring a smile... and keep you from climbing!!!
Grassy Lakes, Canemore
photos.captionKii: What a sweet moment! My companion is absolutely beaming, taking a break to cuddle with these two adorable golden retrievers. She's still got her red climbing helmet on and some gear visible on her harness, reminding me we're deep in our high-mountain adventure. Both dogs look so happy and content, especially the one with its eyes closed, clearly enjoying the attention. The backdrop of dense green trees and rocky terrain shows we're still surrounded by the beautiful wilderness. It's great to see her relax and share some love with these furry friends amidst all our explorations.

photos.caption: Hooked to the rock — Grassy Lakes, Canemore
photos.captionKii: Wow, what an incredible climb! Here's my companion expertly navigating a really challenging rock face, with her red helmet and climbing gear perfectly in place. She's got such a determined focus as she finds her hand and footholds. Below us, the view is absolutely breathtaking – a pristine, clear blue-green lake shimmers, surrounded by dense evergreen forests that stretch towards the majestic, cloud-capped mountains in the distance. It’s moments like these, pushing our limits against such a stunning backdrop, that truly define our high-mountain adventure. This is exactly why we came here, for

photos.caption: Fear Factor: Grizzly bear and cubs — What a scary experience... a grizzly bear with 2 cubs at breakfast time crossing a campground in Banff right next to the tent... I'll never say again that I hate camping next to the car!!!
photos.captionKii: Wow, what an incredible sight! We stumbled upon a family of black bears right near our campsite – a large adult and two adorable cubs. They were just foraging around in the grassy areas between the towering trees, with a blue tent and some cars visible in the background, hinting at our camping setup. It's truly amazing to see such magnificent wildlife up close and in their natural habitat, making this high-mountain exploration even more memorable.

photos.caption: rockies0001
photos.captionKii: After all that climbing, it was definitely time for a snack! Here I am, mid-bite on a bread roll, next to my companion who's also enjoying her meal. We're both wearing our red jackets, taking a moment to refuel amidst the incredible high-mountain scenery. The jagged, rocky peaks and sparse alpine trees rise majestically behind us under a bright sky. It's moments like these, pausing to eat and take in the views, that make these challenging treks so rewarding.

photos.caption: rockies0002 — Scrambling on Abott's ridge. Glacier National Parc, BC
photos.captionKii: What a climb! My companion is making their way along a very narrow and exposed rocky ridge, carefully scrambling over the rough terrain. They're carrying their backpack and wearing a red bandana, focused on the path ahead. Looking out from here, the views are absolutely incredible, with an endless expanse of snow-capped peaks in the distance, a deep, forested valley below, and a winding road visible far off. It truly captures the exhilarating and challenging nature of our high-mountain exploration.

photos.caption: rockies0001 — Scrambling on Abott's ridge. Glacier National Parc, BC
photos.captionKii: What a climb! Here's my companion making her way up a very steep and rocky section of the mountain. She's got her red bandana on, a big orange and black backpack, and she's really focused on finding her handholds and footholds as she ascends. The terrain is incredibly rugged here, with jagged rocks everywhere, and you can really see the steep drop-off below into the valley with a road winding far below. Despite the challenge, she's got a determined yet happy look on her face, which perfectly captures the spirit of our high-mountain adventure. This is exactly the kind of challenging but rewardi

photos.caption: rockies0003 — Ho my feet!
photos.captionKii: My companion is taking a much-needed break from our hike, sitting on a rustic log bench amidst the tall, moss-covered evergreen trees of the forest. She's got her backpack on, and her trekking poles are resting on the dirt path in front of her, ready for the next stretch. The forest around us is so lush and green, full of dense foliage. It's always great to find a good spot to rest and take in the natural beauty during our high-mountain adventure.

photos.caption: rockies0002
photos.captionKii: My companion is hiking along a rocky, uneven path high up in the mountains, with their trekking poles planted firmly. The bright sun is shining intensely from behind them, creating a beautiful lens flare and silhouetting their figure against the brilliant blue sky and dramatic white clouds. In the background, there's an expansive snowfield or glacier winding its way between rugged, snow-capped peaks. It’s another stunning day of our exploration, surrounded by such immense natural beauty and the challenge of the alpine terrain.

photos.caption: rockies0001
photos.captionKii: What an incredible view! My two companions and I stopped to capture this moment on a rocky outcrop, with an absolutely stunning panoramic backdrop of snow-capped mountain ranges, a deep valley, and a crisp blue sky with fluffy clouds. We're all bundled up in our hiking gear, with my companions in their bright red jackets, looking out at the vastness. There's even a lone evergreen tree standing proudly to the right, adding to the dramatic alpine scenery. It's truly breathtaking being up here, and moments like these are what make the high-mountain exploration so unforgettable.

photos.caption: rockies0001
photos.captionKii: What an amazing surprise! We were driving along, and I managed to snap this photo of a black bear lumbering through the dense forest on the hillside. You can also see a reflection in the side mirror of my companion in their bright yellow jacket, looking intently out the window, probably just as excited as I was to see this wild creature. It was such a cool moment, catching a glimpse of wildlife during our high-mountain adventure!

photos.caption: rockies0002 — Wilson ridge... nice scramble with a view on Athabasca Glacier... and it's zillions of tourists in buses
photos.captionKii: My companion is standing on a lush green, rolling hillside, taking a moment to appreciate the incredible panoramic view of the mountains. They're wearing a bright red jacket and grey pants, looking out towards the majestic peaks, some of which still have patches of snow. There's a clear dirt path snaking through the grass, and their backpack and trekking poles are resting on the ground nearby. The sky above is a brilliant blue dotted with beautiful white clouds, creating such a peaceful and expansive scene during our high-mountain adventure. It's moments like these, pausing to take in the vast

photos.caption: rockies0003
photos.captionKii: My companion is taking a well-deserved break, sitting on a rocky outcropping and gazing out at the absolutely breathtaking panoramic view of the snow-capped mountains and the vast glacier winding through the valley below. They're bundled up in their red jacket and red beanie, with their backpack and trekking poles nearby, looking so immersed in the incredible scenery. The sky above is a mix of brilliant blue and dramatic white clouds, making the whole scene feel even more grand. It’s moments like these, high up in the mountains, that truly make the effort worthwhile.

photos.caption: rockies0004
photos.captionKii: Here are my two companions, looking happy and ready for more exploration during our high-mountain adventure! They're both wearing their vibrant red jackets and backpacks, posing on the rocky terrain with patches of green, while the magnificent snow-capped mountains rise grandly behind them under a cloudy but impressive sky. The person on the left seems to be taking a quick sip of something. There's also a cool, moss-covered boulder in the foreground. It was great to capture them smiling, enjoying the incredible scenery and the challenge of the hike, even with the slightly overcast weather.

photos.caption: Crevase rescue... — Ok not really funny
photos.captionKii: My companion is fearlessly climbing out of a deep crevice on the glacier! She's got her hands firmly on the icy walls, pushing herself up with a determined look, all while sporting her bright red jacket and sunglasses. Above her, the vast glacier stretches out under a brilliant blue sky, with a majestic snow-capped mountain peak looming in the distance. It was an exhilarating and challenging part of our high-altitude exploration, getting up close with the incredible formations of the ice.

photos.caption: rockies0001
photos.captionKii: My companion is striking a pose on the expansive glacier, looking fantastic in her bright red jacket and sunglasses against the stunning backdrop of the towering, snow-capped mountains. The sky was such a brilliant blue, with just a few clouds, making for a truly breathtaking moment out here on our high-altitude exploration. It's incredible to be surrounded by such immense natural beauty and feel the crisp mountain air.

photos.caption: rockies0005
photos.captionKii: My companion and I paused for a quick selfie on a vast, textured glacier, surrounded by the incredible grandeur of snow-capped mountains and rocky slopes under a clear blue sky. We're both bundled up in our warm jackets and sunglasses, feeling the chill and the immense beauty of this high-altitude environment. I'm wearing my red jacket and yellow shades, while she's in her orange jacket with dark sunglasses. It was an amazing moment to capture together amidst our high mountain exploration!

photos.caption: Atabasca glacier! Where are you? — Amazing how fast the Athabasca glacier has melt in only a few decades.... What am I doing about global warming?
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping view of the incredible glacial landscape, with towering, snow-capped mountains dominating the horizon. A companion, dressed in a bright red jacket, stands prominently on the rocky path, adding a splash of color to the vast, rugged terrain. Other hikers are scattered further along the trail and resting on rocks. In the foreground, there's a fascinating marker displaying '1982', perhaps indicating a historical point of the glacier's retreat. It's truly breathtaking to be out here, surrounded by such immense natural beauty and the raw power of these mountains during our e

photos.caption: rockies0002
photos.captionKii: My companion and I spotted a black bear while driving through the forest during our high mountain exploration! She's leaning out the car window, absolutely captivated and a little concerned, watching it as it forages in the grassy clearing among the evergreen trees. It was an incredible, albeit slightly tense, moment to see such wildlife up close in its natural habitat.

photos.caption: Big head Stefatty
photos.captionKii: I captured this intense moment mid-climb, looking down into a narrow crevice while ascending a rocky face. I'm geared up with my white helmet, blue t-shirt, and climbing harness, complete with various carabiners and ropes. My feet are finding purchase on the rugged rock, and you can just make out some green foliage in the background below, giving a sense of the height I'm gaining. It was an exhilarating part of our high mountain adventure!

photos.caption: rockies0001
photos.captionKii: I captured this joyous moment with my climbing partner, posing triumphantly after a fantastic climb on this rugged rock face. We're both beaming, making shaka signs, and geared up with our helmets and harnesses, feeling the thrill of the ascent. I'm wearing my white helmet and blue t-shirt, while she has her red helmet on. Behind us, the lush green mountain slopes descend into a valley, with towering trees and distant peaks creating a truly breathtaking alpine backdrop. It was incredible to share this adventure with her amidst such stunning scenery!

photos.caption: rockies0005
photos.captionKii: I captured this serene moment of one of my companions taking a well-deserved break, engrossed in a Sidney Sheldon book. We were sitting at a rustic wooden table outside a cozy log cabin, surrounded by towering evergreen trees under a bright, sunny sky. You can see our trekking poles and a black backpack nearby, evidence of our journey. In the distance, the majestic snow-capped mountains complete the breathtaking alpine backdrop. It was a perfect opportunity to relax and recharge amidst our high mountain exploration.

photos.caption: rockies0006
photos.captionKii: I remember pausing during our high mountain exploration to capture this incredible waterfall cascading down the rugged, dark rock face. The water was so powerful, tumbling over the rocks and creating beautiful foamy pools at the bottom. The rocky terrain around it was so dramatic, with hints of green vegetation clinging to the slopes, and in the distance, a snow-capped peak stood majestically under that perfectly clear, deep blue sky. It was such a refreshing and stunning sight amidst the vast wilderness.

photos.caption: rockies0004
photos.captionKii: I captured this shot of my friend, fully equipped with a large blue backpack, standing proudly on a prominent rock formation during our high mountain exploration. He's wearing a practical khaki shirt and blue pants, perfectly blending with the rugged landscape. Behind him, the scenery is absolutely breathtaking: vast, snow-capped mountains with their rocky slopes rise dramatically under a brilliant, cloudless blue sky. A small, serene lake can be seen in the distance, nestled amidst the valleys, and another small figure is visible further up on the mountain slope, giving a sense of the immense

photos.caption: rockies0003
photos.captionKii: I captured this panoramic view during our high mountain exploration, showing one of my companions taking a moment to stand by a strikingly clear, turquoise-blue alpine lake. They're fully geared up in a red shirt, a red hat, beige pants, and a substantial black and red backpack, leaning on their trekking poles as they take in the vast landscape. The lake itself is fed by a darker blue stream winding through the rocky terrain, which transitions into a lush green valley dotted with evergreen trees further below. Towering snow-capped mountains and rugged peaks dominate the background under a bril

photos.caption: rockies0002
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this shot of a woman standing by a stunning, clear blue alpine lake during our high mountain exploration. She's wearing a bright red top and light pants, looking out towards the incredible landscape. You can see our gear, including backpacks and trekking poles, resting on the rocky shore beside her. Behind her, the massive snow-capped mountains rise majestically, with rocky slopes and patches of snow leading down to the water's edge. The clear blue sky and the calm, reflective water really highlight the immense beauty and tranquility of this spot. It was such a perfect mom

photos.caption: For Ron & Sylvia at Abott's Pass
photos.captionKii: I captured this moment of two of my companions looking incredibly happy and strong as we navigated a very steep, rocky section of our high mountain exploration. They're both bundled up in bright red jackets and dark pants, with substantial backpacks, truly embodying the spirit of adventure. The person on the right is using their trekking poles, and both are giving a cheerful thumbs-up or similar gesture, really showing their enthusiasm despite the challenging, scree-filled terrain. Towering rocky cliffs surround us under a brilliant, clear blue sky, with patches of snow still visible on the sl

photos.caption: rockies0007
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment during our high mountain exploration, seeing my friend take a well-deserved break. They're sitting comfortably in the deep snow, bundled up in a red jacket and black beanie, with their skis and poles laid out beside them. It's a vast, snowy landscape with some dark rocky outcrops in the background, showing just how high up we were. The tracks in the snow stretching behind them remind me of the long journey we were making, but this was a perfect pause to soak in the immense, quiet beauty of the alpine wilderness before continuing our adventure.

photos.caption: rockies0006
photos.captionKii: I remember turning around and capturing this view of one of my companions trekking steadfastly up the immense snowfield. They were quite a distance ahead, making their way with trekking poles, and you can clearly see the trail of footprints they left behind in the pristine snow. The sheer scale of the mountains was breathtaking, with that dark, rugged rock face towering on the left and snow-covered peaks stretching out under the deep blue sky, dotted with a few dramatic clouds. It truly felt like we were conquering giants, one step at a time, during our incredible high mountain exploration.

photos.caption: rockies0005
photos.captionKii: I love this shot of my friend pausing on the snowy slope during our high mountain exploration. She's dressed perfectly for the cold in her bright red jacket, dark hat, and sunglasses, holding her trekking poles firmly as she stands against the stunning backdrop of the snow-covered mountains and that incredibly deep blue sky. You can see the rocky peaks peeking out from behind the snowfields, and those scattered white clouds add so much character to the scene. It really captures the essence of our journey, climbing higher and higher through this beautiful, vast wilderness.

photos.caption: rockies0003
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this picture with my friend high up in the mountains, bundled up in our red jackets and black beanies, with the vast snow-covered slopes and rugged rock faces stretching out behind us. The air was crisp, and the immense scale of the peaks under that partly cloudy sky was just breathtaking. You can see my friend's sunglasses reflecting the bright light, and I'm sure we were both feeling the chill and the exhilaration of being so high up. It was an incredible moment to share, a true highlight of our high mountain exploration, surrounded by such raw, untamed beauty.

photos.caption: rockies0002
photos.captionKii: I captured this incredible scene looking up towards the vast snowy slopes and rugged rock faces during our high mountain exploration. The deep blue sky with those dramatic white clouds created such a striking contrast against the stark white snow and the dark, imposing cliff on the left. You can really feel the immensity of the mountain here, with the faint tracks in the snow hinting at the paths we were making. It was a moment that reminded me of the raw, untamed beauty of the alpine wilderness we were navigating.

photos.caption: rockies0001
photos.captionKii: I really like this picture of one of my companions taking a moment to pause on the expansive snowfield during our high mountain exploration. They're geared up perfectly for the alpine environment, wearing a vibrant red jacket, a dark hat, and sunglasses, with trekking poles firmly in hand. Behind them, the massive snow-covered mountain rises dramatically, showing off some rugged rocky sections against the incredibly deep blue sky, which is dotted with those beautiful, fluffy white clouds. It truly captures the immense scale and serene beauty of the wilderness we were exploring.

photos.caption: rockies0004
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing one of my companions making their way across this vast, pristine snowfield during our high mountain exploration. They were wearing a red jacket and dark pants, with a backpack and trekking poles, looking quite small against the immense scale of the snowy mountain range. The sheer rock face on the left, partially covered in snow, and the distant, dramatic snow-covered peaks under a partly cloudy sky truly convey the challenging and awe-inspiring landscape we were navigating. It was a moment that really highlighted the grandeur of the alpine wilderness and the long journey we w

photos.caption: rockies0013
photos.captionKii: What an incredible view from up high! I remember looking out at this majestic panorama of snow-capped mountains and rugged, rocky slopes. The sun was just peeking through the dramatic clouds, highlighting the intricate textures of the scree in the foreground and the towering, jagged peaks in the distance. It was so breathtaking to see the remnants of snow even in July, making the whole scene feel truly alpine and wild. Moments like these remind me why I love exploring these incredible landscapes and soaking in the vastness of nature.

photos.caption: rockies0012
photos.captionKii: I remember being completely awestruck by this view during our high mountain exploration. This particular spot offered such an incredible perspective, showcasing the vast expanse of snow-covered peaks and a massive glacier cascading down the mountain face. The deep blues of the sky were just incredible, framed by those dramatic white clouds, making the entire landscape feel even more immense and wild. You can really get a sense of the rugged terrain and the sheer scale of the wilderness we were immersed in, looking down into that deep valley.

photos.caption:
Comfort of a mountain hut — What a pleasure, a hot drink in a causy mountain hut after a hard hike day to get there... 
Abott's hut, Yoho National Park
photos.captionKii: I remember this quiet moment so well during our high mountain exploration. It was such a welcome break to step inside, even if just for a little while. Here, a friend is taking a moment to herself, deeply engrossed in a book while sipping from a warm mug. Through the window, you can still clearly see the vast, snow-covered mountains, a constant reminder of the incredible wilderness we were in. The simple lantern on the shelf adds to the cozy, rustic feeling of our shelter, a perfect spot to recharge before heading back out.

photos.caption: rockies0009
photos.captionKii: I remember this vista from our high mountain exploration so vividly! Here, one of us is making their way down a steep, rocky path, using trekking poles for stability. The terrain was incredibly challenging, a mix of loose rocks and patches of lingering snow, carved through these dramatic, towering rock formations. Looking further down, you can catch a glimpse of that incredible, deep blue alpine lake glistening in the valley, a truly breathtaking sight amidst the rugged, snow-streaked peaks surrounding us. It truly felt like we were immersed in an epic mountain landscape.

photos.caption: rockies0010
photos.captionKii: I loved taking a moment to just soak in the sheer scale of these mountains during our exploration. This shot really captures the majestic beauty of the peaks, draped in pristine white snow that contrasts so beautifully with the dark, rugged rock faces emerging beneath. The sky overhead was just incredible, a vibrant blue dotted with those dramatic, fluffy white clouds that made the whole scene feel even more immense and wild. It was truly breathtaking to be surrounded by such an epic landscape.

photos.caption: rockies0008
photos.captionKii: I remember this part of our climb so well! Here, two of my friends are steadily making their way up this incredibly rugged and challenging mountain path. The ground is a mix of loose rock and scree, with patches of snow still visible, making those trekking poles essential for stability. They're both wearing red backpacks, focused on the ascent. The sheer scale of these towering, dark rock faces around us was just immense, dominating the sky with dramatic clouds. It truly felt like we were deep in the wilderness, pushing our limits during our high mountain exploration.

photos.caption: rockies0007
photos.captionKii: I love this shot from our high mountain adventure! Here, my friend is making excellent progress up this challenging, snow-dusted rocky slope, looking back at the camera with a determined yet happy expression. You can see how rugged the terrain was, a mix of loose rock and lingering snow, making those trekking poles essential. Behind them, another member of our group is steadily ascending. And check out that incredible, vivid blue alpine lake sparkling far below in the valley, nestled among the dramatic, snow-streaked peaks and dark rock faces. It really shows the effort and the immense rewards

photos.caption: rockies0006
photos.captionKii: I remember this part of our high mountain exploration so vividly! Here's one of us, steadily making our way up a steep, snow-covered slope. You can really see the effort, with the trekking poles planted firmly in the snow and the big red backpack. The path was a mix of snow and loose rocks, making for a challenging ascent, but the rugged, dark rock formations to our side and the distant snow-capped peaks made the climb absolutely worth it. It felt like we were truly pushing our limits and immersing ourselves in the raw beauty of the alpine environment.

photos.caption: Turquoise lake
photos.captionKii: I'll never forget this incredible view! My friend looks like a tiny speck against the vastness of this landscape, steadily making their way up the rocky, barren slope with trekking poles. The vibrant blue alpine lake below us was absolutely mesmerizing, reflecting the light against the backdrop of those majestic, snow-capped peaks and rugged cliffs. It truly captured the immense scale and raw beauty of our mountain exploration, feeling so high up and immersed in such a powerful natural environment.

photos.caption: rockies0004
photos.captionKii: I remember feeling so invigorated standing next to this powerful waterfall! The water was just gushing down, creating such a strong current over all the rocks and creating a beautiful spray. I'm wearing my red jacket and backpack, feeling ready for more exploration, and I love how happy and content I look in this shot. It was truly an awesome moment, soaking in the raw energy of nature during our trek through these incredible mountains.

photos.caption: rockies0003
photos.captionKii: I love this photo of my friend on our mountain exploration! We were making our way up a rocky, uneven path, with a beautiful little stream cascading down the slope beside us, surrounded by lush green foliage. The towering rock formations and distant peaks really give a sense of the rugged beauty we were immersed in. It was such a fulfilling part of our hike, tackling that terrain.

photos.caption: rockies0001 — Mendatory bus to Lake O'hara
photos.captionKii: I loved this moment with my friend, capturing our happy, slightly tired faces after our high mountain exploration. We're both bundled up in our warm red jackets, leaning in close on what looks like a shuttle bus. You can just make out some of the notices on the wall behind us, including one for the 'Lake O'Hara Trails Club,' which brings back memories of our journey to such an incredible place. It was great to share these adventures and travels with a good friend.

photos.caption: rockies0002

It was such a peaceful moment, watching it from the car, and I’m so glad we captured her joy and the beauty of the wildlife in its natural habitat during our exploration.
