photos.caption: kayak-strose0003
photos.captionKii: This photo brings back memories of a fantastic day out on the water. Here's my friend, all smiles in his hat and sunglasses, sitting comfortably in his blue 'Cape Horn' kayak. He's wearing a bright red life vest, looking completely at ease as he reaches over to the red kayak next to him. You can just glimpse someone else in the red kayak, relaxing behind him. The water looks so calm, and with the trees lining the distant shore, it was such a peaceful environment for kayaking. It was great to just paddle around and enjoy the scenery with good company.

photos.caption: 200506-leadclimbing-0024
photos.captionKii: Here's a refreshing close-up of my glass, filled with a lovely amber-colored drink that looks like a beer or cider, sitting on a patterned outdoor table. The sunlight is dappling through the overhead lattice, creating nice shadows and a bright atmosphere. In the background, you can see glimpses of friends enjoying themselves, with one person in focus raising their own glass. This shot perfectly captures a relaxed moment of unwinding and enjoying good company, possibly at a pub or cafe patio, after what must have been an eventful day.

photos.caption: 200506-leadclimbing-0015
photos.captionKii: Here, one of the participants is really focused, carefully examining a crack in the rock face during our workshop. He's wearing his yellow helmet and glasses, and I captured him holding what looks like a nut pick or a similar tool, ready to use it for cleaning or placing gear. A climbing rope is visible right next to him, anchored securely to the rock. It's great to see everyone so engaged and hands-on, applying the techniques we've been learning to the actual rock features.

photos.caption: 200506-leadclimbing-0020
photos.captionKii: Here's a fantastic shot capturing two participants in action during our outdoor climbing workshop. One of the women is gracefully ascending the rock face, making her way up with determination, while the man below is expertly belaying her, ensuring her safety with the rope. Both are wearing their helmets and climbing gear, fully focused on the task at hand. The rugged rock and the surrounding trees really highlight the natural environment we were training in. It's great to see everyone putting the lessons into practice and gaining confidence on the rock.

photos.caption: 200506-leadclimbing-0012
photos.captionKii: Here I am, all geared up in my climbing harness and orange helmet, crouching by the rock face with a big smile! I’ve got all my gear—carabiners, slings, and other pieces of equipment—hanging from my harness, and I'm holding a cam in my hands, ready to go. The sunlight is dappling through the trees, illuminating the rugged rock, and you can see ropes already set up on the wall. This shot perfectly captures the excitement and readiness I felt during our outdoor climbing workshop, right as we were about to put all our lessons into practice on the rocks.

photos.caption: 200506-leadclimbing-0011
photos.captionKii: Here, I captured a moment focusing on some of our climbing gear, specifically the purple webbing and slings, meticulously laid out on the forest floor, possibly for inspection or organization. You can see how they're fanned out and connected with a carabiner to one of the trees. There's also some green webbing and other ropes nearby. In the background, a person is standing by a tree, and a tent is partially visible on the left, which really sets the scene for our base camp. It’s all part of our outdoor climbing workshop, getting everything ready for our next session on the rocks.

photos.caption: 200506-leadclimbing-0003
photos.captionKii: Here, we're gathered around a picnic table in a wooded area, listening intently as our instructor explains some of the climbing gear. He's holding up a bunch of those specialized cams and nuts, showing us how they work and probably going over safety protocols or techniques. On the wooden table, there's a white climbing helmet, along with harnesses and other bits of gear, all laid out and ready for us to use. It looks like we're at a base camp, with other people, tents, and even a car in the background. It's great to refresh our knowledge and learn new things before hitting the rocks again.

Here's my friend, looking super focused as she handles the ropes, probably setting up for a rappel or belay. She's got her red climbing helmet on and all the gear — harness, carabiners, and ropes — everything needed for a good climb. We were out on this rocky ledge, surrounded by those beautiful green trees, and the sunlight was just perfect, making for another amazing day experiencing the thrill of our outdoor adventures together.

Here's my friend, all geared up and ready to go, or perhaps just finishing up a climb! He's got that classic white climbing helmet on and his harness, expertly handling the rope and what looks like a belay device. He’s got a big, joyful smile on his face, even though he looks a little dirty and sweaty, which just shows how much fun he's having out here in the woods. The sunlight filtering through the trees, the vibrant green foliage, and the rocky terrain behind him really set the scene for another great day of our outdoor adventures.

Here's my friend really getting into it on the rock face. I love seeing the focus and determination when someone's mid-climb! They're reaching up for the next hold, with their climbing shoes planted firmly, and the rope secure. The sun was really bright, creating cool shadows on the dark rock as they worked their way up. It’s a great shot that reminds me of the thrill of our climbing adventures.

photos.caption: To swim or not to swim
photos.captionKii: Our beloved white dog with light brown patches looks so content here, standing in the shallow water of the lake. Its fur is clearly wet from a good swim, and it's looking right at me, almost posing. There's a big rock partly submerged in front of it, adding to the natural feel of the scene. The water is calm, reflecting the vibrant green of the surrounding foliage, making for such a peaceful moment during our outdoor adventure.

photos.caption: 20050605-giant-adk0010
photos.captionKii: It’s always great to just relax by the water after an adventure. Here's my friend, crouching by the lake, gently interacting with our white dog who’s standing in the shallow water. You can tell he just had a good swim, his fur is still visibly wet! The sun is sparkling on the calm lake surface, and there’s that big fallen log near the shore. It was such a peaceful moment, just enjoying the natural beauty around us.

photos.caption: 20050605-giant-adk0009
photos.captionKii: I love capturing these peaceful moments during our outdoor adventures. Here's a friend of mine, bending down by the water's edge, interacting with our white dog. The dog looks like it just had a good swim, with its fur visibly wet as it enjoys the attention. We were by this beautiful, calm lake, its surface rippling gently and reflecting the lush green, forested mountains that surrounded us. A large fallen log stretched partly into the water, and the cloudy sky gave everything a soft, serene light. It was a perfect moment to just relax and take in the natural beauty of the area.

photos.caption: 20050604-noonmark-adk0017
photos.captionKii: I remember our furry companion exploring around us during that climbing trip. Here's that beautiful white dog with light brown patches, nose to the ground, sniffing among the rocks and sparse greenery. It looks like it's really enjoying the freedom of being out in nature with us, surrounded by all the bushes and rugged terrain of the climbing area.

photos.caption: 20050604-noonmark-adk0016
photos.captionKii: It's moments like these that really make an adventure special. Here's one of my friends, sitting comfortably on a big rock, taking a break and happily petting a beautiful golden-brown dog. She's still wearing her blue climbing helmet, but she's kicked off her shoes, enjoying the cool rock under her bare feet. The smile on her face as she interacts with the dog really captures the relaxed and joyful vibe we had during our climbing day, even with the sparse, rugged scenery around us.

photos.caption: 20050604-noonmark-adk0013
photos.captionKii: This shot really captures the focus and effort it takes when you're out rock climbing. Here, one of us is fully engrossed in making their way up this dark, rugged rock face. They're wearing a white helmet and a bright red shirt, with all their climbing gear—harness, ropes, and carabiners—clearly visible and ready for action. You can just feel the determination as they reach for the next hold. The cloudy sky and the faint outline of distant mountains in the background remind me of the beautiful, expansive views we got from up there.

photos.caption: 20050604-noonmark-adk0008
photos.captionKii: This shot vividly brings back the thrill of that rock climbing day! Here's one of us, a woman, making her way up that really challenging, rugged rock face. She's wearing her red helmet and that distinct light green top, with all her gear hanging from her harness. The scale of the mountains behind her truly gives a sense of how high we were, with those layers of blue-green forests stretching out under a partly cloudy sky. It was such an exhilarating experience, pushing our limits and taking in those incredible views from up there.

photos.caption: 20050604-noonmark-adk0006
photos.captionKii: It's so great to see how much fun we were having during that rock climbing adventure! This shot perfectly captures one of my friends, smiling confidently, as she navigates her way up the steep rock face. She's got her red helmet on and that lime green top really pops against the rugged, mossy grey rock. You can feel the altitude with the mountains visible in the distance under that cloudy sky. It was such a rewarding day for all of us, pushing our limits and enjoying the incredible views.

photos.caption: 20050604-noonmark-adk0004
photos.captionKii: This shot brings back memories of a fantastic day out rock climbing! You can see one of us high up on the sheer rock face, making good progress. Below, two of my friends are expertly handling the ropes, belaying with such focus—one in a red helmet and orange shorts, and the other in a blue helmet. The day was perfect for it, with clear skies and the rugged beauty of the mountains around us, accented by the branches reaching in from the side. It was such a great feeling to be out there, challenging ourselves and enjoying nature together.

photos.caption: 20050501-biodome-0014
photos.captionKii: This photo, though a bit blurry from the low light, really captures the grandeur and excitement of the venue we were in that evening! You can see the stage dominated by a large, beautifully detailed mural or backdrop, which looks like some kind of classical or elaborate painting. Below it, the theater is packed with people, all facing forward, clearly engrossed in whatever performance was happening. The warm, twinkling lights strung across the ceiling and along the side walls added such a magical and festive atmosphere to the whole place. It was definitely a memorable night out, taking in the

photos.caption: 20050501-biodome-0013
photos.captionKii: This photo captures such a fun, casual moment with my family and a friend during an evening out! I'm in the foreground, taking the selfie with my glasses on, and next to me, my mom is smiling sweetly. My dad is behind her, looking a bit tired or perhaps just taking it all in, which is pretty classic for him! On the far left, my friend is being silly, sticking her tongue out, which always makes me laugh. We seem to be in a darker venue, maybe a theater, concert, or even just some public transport at night, given the blue structure and railings behind us. It was great to just relax and enjoy som

photos.caption: 20050501-biodome-0001
photos.captionKii: I remember this day so clearly – it was such a pleasant family outing! Here, my dad, with his classic striped shirt, is looking intently, probably at an exhibit or animal, while my mom, in her dark jacket and glasses, is holding some information leaflets, clearly absorbed in reading about what we're seeing. We're surrounded by lush, vibrant greenery, which makes me think we were in a botanical garden or a large conservatory at a zoo. You can just make out a railing where my mom is resting her hand, and there's a display board nearby that she seems to be looking at. The atmosphere was so relaxe

photos.caption: Symetrie
photos.captionKii: I remember this day so well – it was when our little puppy first met the cat! It looks like they're having a cautious but curious sniff-off right there on our polished wooden floor. The puppy, all light-colored and cute with its floppy ears, is wearing a collar and leash, which means it was probably still quite new to the house or we were just introducing them carefully. The cat, a sleek Siamese with its beautiful dark points, has its tail up in a slight curve, indicating curiosity rather than aggression. You can see the plant in the background and the general cozy feel of the house. It was su

photos.caption: Dark corner
photos.captionKii: I love looking back at photos like this! It was a great night out with friends, probably at a local pub, where we could just relax and chat. Here, my friend with the long hair is really engaged, looking directly at my friend wearing glasses, who's listening intently. You can see a couple of pint glasses on the table, suggesting we were enjoying some drinks. The low lighting, with the glow from the streetlights outside through the window, gives the whole scene a really cozy, intimate vibe. These are the moments that truly make me appreciate good company and conversation.

photos.caption: Burglars... no! Winter runners!
photos.captionKii: This photo totally takes me back to another one of those chilly, fun winter days! Here we are, bundled up in our balaclavas, looking like a couple of winter adventurers ready to brave the cold. My friend in front has snow or ice clinging to her balaclava and jacket, which just shows how much we were out there enjoying the elements. You can see her eyes smiling through the mask, and I think I'm giving a similar expression behind her – definitely ready for some more playful winter fun. It looks like we're standing near an entrance or window, maybe just coming in or heading back out into the snow

photos.caption: Happy crashing
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment so fondly! It was one of those perfect snowy days, and my friend here, all bundled up in her jacket and hat with those cool sunglasses, was just full of playful energy. She totally nuzzled my face right in the snow – you can see her smiling widely, and her gloves are covered in snow, showing how much fun we were having! I was wearing my balaclava, keeping warm, and it looks like we had just been skiing or were about to, given the ski visible next to us. It was such a joyful and affectionate moment, just embracing the winter wonderland and each other's company.

photos.caption: getting steep
photos.captionKii: This photo brings back memories of such a challenging but rewarding day out in the snow! I remember us making our way up this steep, snow-covered slope, surrounded by breathtaking views of the distant mountains and valleys. Here, my friend is resting on a rocky ledge, his large backpack looking quite heavy, while another one of us is carefully trekking up the snowy path with poles, showing the effort required for this winter hike. The clear blue sky made for perfect visibility, showcasing the vast, wild beauty of the winter landscape. It was tough going, but moments like these, pushing ourselv

photos.caption: Chistoso
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic day for a winter hike with friends! I remember us bundled up in all our gear, trekking poles in hand, with the crisp snow crunching under our boots. Here are my friends, all smiles, enjoying the stunning panoramic views from what feels like the top of the world. The guy in the back is always a jokester, giving us bunny ears, which always makes me laugh. We had such a clear, sunny day, perfect for taking in the vast expanse of the snow-covered forest stretching out below us. Moments like these, surrounded by nature and good company, are truly special.

photos.caption: Frosties
photos.captionKii: Wow, what a day out in the snow! I remember this so vividly, it was absolutely freezing but so beautiful. Here's my friend, all bundled up, his beard and hair completely frosted over, and those cool sunglasses reflecting the bright winter sun – he looked like a true winter warrior! And next to him, my other friend, smiling brightly despite the cold, with snow clinging to her hat and jacket. We were surrounded by these gorgeous snow-covered trees, making it feel like we were deep in a serene winter wonderland. It was one of those memorable days spent embracing the cold and enjoying the pristine

photos.caption: Y a-t-il vraiment un BB parmis nous?
photos.captionKii: This photo brings back such warm memories of a beautiful day! I remember seeing my friends, a couple, beaming with pride and joy as they celebrated what looks like a christening or baptism for their baby. The dad is holding their precious little one, all swaddled in a lovely white gown, and he's got such a wide, happy smile for the camera. The mom is gently touching the baby's head, looking down with such affection. We were in a church, and you can see the warm glow of the lights on the wooden pews in the background, creating such a reverent and intimate atmosphere. It was truly a special mome

photos.caption: Qui a la plus beau sourire?
photos.captionKii: What a fun and festive Halloween night this was! I remember my friend, beaming with a lovely smile, posing next to her fantastic jack-o'-lantern. She did such a great job carving that pumpkin, giving it a playful, toothy grin and bright star-shaped eyes, which really made it feel like Halloween. On the table, there's even a slice of what looks like pumpkin, perhaps for a treat, and a neat bunch of asparagus tied with a blue ribbon. It was moments like these, celebrating holidays and getting creative with friends, that made the autumn season so special.

It was such a fun and cozy evening catching up with friends! Here we are, all together in the living room, sharing some laughs. I remember sitting back, enjoying the conversation and the warm atmosphere of the room. My friend in the middle, smiling brightly, was showing something interesting in that book or calendar to our friend on the left, who was enjoying a glass of wine. I love how this photo captures the relaxed and joyful vibe of our gathering, with the warm colors of the room and the plant adding to the cozy feeling. These casual moments of connection are truly special.

photos.caption: Dreaming of...
photos.captionKii: What a cozy evening this was! I remember sitting back, enjoying a glass of wine, while my friend showed me something interesting on this calendar. She's holding it open to the month of May, and I can clearly see a striking image of a mountain climber on a snowy peak. It looks like we were just relaxing on the sofa, with the warm hues of the room's decor, like that red wall and tapestry, creating a really inviting atmosphere. It’s moments like these, simply spending time together indoors, that I truly cherish.

photos.caption: Friends in Fall Colors
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful autumn hike this was! I remember standing with this wonderful group, surrounded by the most incredible fall foliage – all those vibrant reds, oranges, and yellows really popped, especially with the sun casting a warm glow through the leaves. We all had our backpacks on, suggesting we were either taking a break or just getting started on our trek. There’s a beautiful valley stretching out behind us, hinting at the amazing views we got to experience. It was such a perfect day to be out in nature with good company, enjoying the crisp air and the stunning colors of the season. Thi

photos.caption: A first encounter
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic memory of this group outing! Here we all are, a wonderful group of friends, posing together against a dramatic rocky backdrop. Everyone is dressed for an adventure, geared up with backpacks and comfortable clothing, looking ready to tackle whatever trail was ahead of us. There’s a mix of ages, which always makes for a great dynamic on a hike. It was such a great feeling to be out in nature, surrounded by such good company, and this photo really captures the spirit of our expedition.

photos.caption: 5O5, Bertrand a la barre... et moi au trapeze (Montpellier)
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic day out on the water! I remember this exhilarating moment, sailing on what looks like a catamaran. The waves were lively, creating plenty of spray that made the sail glisten, and I'm sitting on the edge, focused on the water ahead. Looking out at the horizon, with the distant coastline dotted with buildings, I felt completely in my element. The sun was out, the wind was perfect for cutting through the water, making for an unforgettable sailing experience.

photos.caption: Pause scramble dans les Pyrenees
photos.captionKii: What an incredible view from up here! I remember taking a break on this rocky ledge, just soaking it all in during my mountain trek. The vastness of the landscape is breathtaking, with layers of green valleys and distant peaks stretching into the hazy sky. You can see the steep, rugged slopes around me, and I'm sitting there, feeling the accomplishment of the climb. It was such a peaceful moment, surrounded by nothing but the majestic mountains.

photos.caption: Immersion, Estartit, Espagne (Catalogne)
photos.captionKii: What a memory this is! I love capturing moments underwater. Here, a fellow diver, fully equipped with their mask, regulator, wetsuit, and Mares BCD, navigates the blue depths. They look a bit wide-eyed, perhaps in awe of something or just intensely focused on the dive. On the left, you can see a rich underwater landscape with rocky formations covered in various types of marine growth, and even a small fish swimming in the distance. It was definitely an exhilarating dive.

photos.caption: Besoin d'aide?... Self Rescue
photos.captionKii: This shot takes me back to a paddling day on the water. From the bow of my own red kayak, you can see someone working diligently to re-enter or recover their capsized red kayak. There's a bright yellow float bag nearby, which is essential gear for situations like this. The water looks a bit choppy from the wind, and the overcast sky made for a serious but focused atmosphere, with the dense green forest providing a beautiful backdrop along the distant shore.
